heading: Gain or loss to shareholder in corporate liquidations
label: 331 Gain or loss to shareholder in corporate liquidations
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “shareholder” for “shareholders” in section catchline.Pub. L. 115–1411982—Subsec. (a). , substituted provisions that amounts received by a shareholder in a distribution in complete liquidation of a corporation shall be treated as in full payment in exchange for the stock for provisions that, in complete liquidations, amounts distributed shall be treated as in full payment in exchange for the stock, while amounts distributed in partial liquidation shall be treated as in part or full payment in exchange for the stock.Pub. (c). substituted “reference” for “references” in heading and struck out cross reference relating to general rule for determination of the amount of gain or loss to the distributee and substituted “section 1001” for “section 1002”.Pub. L. 94–4551964—Subsec. (b). inserted “(other than a distribution referred to in paragraph (2)(B) of section 316(b))”.Pub. L. 88–272

children.heading: Distributions in complete liquidation treated as exchanges
children.label: a Distributions in complete liquidation treated as exchanges
children.text: Amounts received by a shareholder in a distribution in complete liquidation of a corporation shall be treated as in full payment in exchange for the stock.

children.heading: Nonapplication of section 301
children.label: b Nonapplication of section 301
children.text: Section 301 (relating to effects on shareholder of distributions of property) shall not apply to any distribution of property (other than a distribution referred to in paragraph (2)(B) of section 316(b)) in complete liquidation.

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: c Cross reference
children.text: For general rule for determination of the amount of gain or loss recognized, see section 1001.
